stemHtml: During the climb-out phase of a flight, the pilot-in-command becomes incapacitated. The co-pilot takes control of the aircraft and returns it safely to the aerodrome of departure. What notification or reporting action must be taken after landing?

options.a: The pilot-in-command or the operator must complete a report on behalf of the airport authority within 48 hours.
options.b: The crew must follow the procedure relevant to a serious incident.
options.c: The operator must inform the airport authority by writing an irregularity report.
options.d: The crew must follow the procedure relevant to an accident.
